items.titolo: Intel Arc GPUs can finally boot up and play 'Crimson Desert' — but you'll probably want to wait for official support
items.descrizione: Intel's latest GPU driver is capable of booting Crimson Desert and can reportedly run at nearly 60 FPS at ultra settings on an Arc B580. But the game suffers from occasional crashing and visual artifacts.
